name: Elemental Transfiguration: Rimegrass Blessing
title: Elemental Transfiguration: Rimegrass Blessing
desc: As rime seals the land and the grasses fall still, all sounds are hushed.
in_play_description:
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Cryo Dice and 2 Dendro Dice.
Before you choose an action, if there is an opposing character affected by both Cryo and Dendro: Discard this card, then choose either Rimegrass Blessing: Thorn Frost or Rimegrass Blessing: Cold Vine and add it to your Hand.

skills.desc:
